title: FIGS Earnings Forecast and Analyst Expectations
text: StockAnalysis consensus earnings forecasts for FIGS showing expected EPS for remainder of 2026 and into 2027. Q2 2026 expected low-20s revenue growth with margin stability. Full-year 2026 guidance raised to 14-16% growth with 13.0-13.2% adjusted EBITDA margins. Analysts refining estimates based on Q1 beat demonstrating execution capability. International segment showing strongest growth momentum with expansion gains in early-stage markets. Domestic business stabilizing with frequency trends inflecting positively. Consensus price targets ranging from $15-19 reflecting mixed confidence in sustainability of current growth trajectory. Key variables for 2026 earnings: continued international ramp rate, domestic market stabilization, tariff environment, and promotional mix decisions.
